task_completion.description: Nx Witness Desktop Client is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness Desktop Client application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A layout named 'Warehouse Map' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab at the top of the viewing area or an active item in the left resource panel is named 'Warehouse Map'.

task_completion.description: The warehouse floor plan is set as the layout background
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewing area of the 'Warehouse Map' layout displays a floor plan image. The image should have visible zones such as 'MAIN ENTRANCE' at the bottom and 'SERVER ROOM' at the top right.

task_completion.description: The 'Entrance Camera' is positioned at the bottom center of the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: A camera item or video panel labeled 'Entrance Camera' is placed on the layout background at the bottom center, near the 'MAIN ENTRANCE' zone.

task_completion.description: The 'Server Room Camera' is positioned at the top right of the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: A camera item or video panel labeled 'Server Room Camera' is placed on the layout background at the top right, near the 'SERVER ROOM' zone.
The 'Warehouse Map' appears under the 'Layouts' section in the left-hand resource tree, and the layout tab does not have an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk * next to the name).

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nx Witness Desktop Client interface being interacted with, rather than just terminal windows or API scripts.

integrity.description: The background image is loaded inside the Nx Witness layout
integrity.visual_evidence: The floor plan image is clearly set as the background within the Nx Witness layout grid, not just opened in a separate image viewer application.

integrity.description: The cameras placed are actual Nx Witness camera items
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Entrance Camera' and 'Server Room Camera' appear as standard Nx Witness camera icons or video panels on the layout, not as text overlays or edited images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layout name is exactly 'Warehouse Map'. The background image 'warehouse_plan.png' is a floor plan featuring labeled zones: 'MAIN ENTRANCE' at the bottom, 'SERVER ROOM' at the top right, and 'WAREHOUSE FLOOR' in the center. The 'Entrance Camera' must be positioned at the bottom center (near MAIN ENTRANCE), and the 'Server Room Camera' must be positioned at the top right (near SERVER ROOM).
